name: @scalemule/embed-token
description: Server-side signing SDK for Gallop Video Player embed tokens

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; if(!/^0\.(0|1)\.\d+$/.test(v)){console.error('ERR: SDK '+v+' violates patch-only policy (0.0.x or 0.1.x only). See CONTRIBUTING.md SDK versioning section.');process.exit(1)}"

author: ScaleMule Inc. <support@scalemule.com>
